chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.224 of 2017 M/s Sajid Brothers & Co. & others Versus M/s Allied Bank Limited Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA 3896/17 Dated: 17.10.2023 Mr. Muhammad Ahmer holds brief for Mr. Sami Ahsan for appellants along with Kashif Raza, registered Clerk of appellants’ counsel. None for respondents. -.-.- Learned counsel holding brief for Mr. Sami Ahsan submits that the bank has settled the matter out of Court with the appellants and a letter in this regard is placed through a statement filed in Court today, which is taken on record. It is stated that on such out of Court settlement appellants do not wish to proceed with this matter. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
